user_task_description: This workbook contains the right worksheets but they are arranged in an inconvenient order.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Reorder the worksheets so the tab order becomes: `Instructions` -> `Lookup` -> `Detail_Q1` -> `Detail_Q2` -> `Summary`.
atomic_scope: Only worksheet reordering is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx workbook with the requested tab order.

inspired_by.title: Sorting and rearranging data using Pivot Table

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The current order is plausible enough that a shallow pass may miss the issue
- Several sheet names are similar and easy to misplace
- The task is structural and should not trigger content edits
